brand.name: Syanah
brand.tagline: Saudi Arabia's top maintenance providers, in one app

home.heroSubtitle: Book a verified technician for your home, car, or business in any Saudi city. Live tracking, transparent pricing, service guarantee.

quote.author: Noura from Riyadh
quote.body: The technician arrived in 20 minutes and finished the job professionally.

categories.title: Browse by category
categories.subtitle: We cover everything your home or business needs.

howItWorks.title: Three simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From booking to rating, your experience is smooth and clear.
howItWorks.step1Body: Browse categories or search for the service you need.
howItWorks.step2Body: See ratings, experience, and prices before you book.
howItWorks.step3Body: Track your technician live and rate them when done.

trustSection.verifiedBody: Every provider passes ID and commercial-record checks before accepting any order.
trustSection.paymentBody: Pay with Mada or card; we hold the amount until the work is completed.
trustSection.guaranteeBody: If the service isn't done right, get a full refund or a free re-do.

testimonials.title: 12,000+ happy customers
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from across the Kingdom.

t1.name: Noura Al-Zahrani
t1.body: First time booking AC service via an app. Technician arrived exactly on time and was very professional.

t2.name: Ahmed Al-Qahtani
t2.body: Clear prices, no surprises. I expected hassle but the whole process was smooth.

t3.name: Sarah Al-Otaibi
t3.body: Love that I could track the provider on the map. Knowing when exactly they'd arrive put me at ease.

providersCta.title: Grow your business with us
providersCta.body: Join a network of 850+ verified providers and get real bookings every day with secure, scheduled payouts.

demand.title: Real, steady demand
demand.body: Thousands of customers search for services daily in your cities.

payouts.title: Weekly payouts
payouts.body: Your earnings land in your bank account automatically every week.

growth.title: Tools to grow
growth.body: Track performance, ratings, and grow your business with our tools.

footer.tagline: Syanah Platform — Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

hints.phonePrimary: Mobile is required and used to sign in.
hints.usernameOptional: Optional — lowercase letters, digits and _ only, 3-30 chars. Lets you sign in instead of using your phone.
hints.handleHint: Enter your username or phone number (or email if you added one).

rolesHint.requester: I book services for my home or business
rolesHint.both: You can pick both — a switch will appear to toggle between them.

auth.locationIntro: Set your region, governorate and city so we can match you with nearby providers. You can also pin your location on the map.

errors.usernameInvalid: Invalid username (lowercase letters, digits and _ only, 3-30 chars)

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.body: You don't have permission to view this page.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Pick a category to browse services and providers
services.categorySubtitle: Choose a city; rate providers after each job

noProvidersYet.title: We're matching you with top providers in this category
noProvidersYet.body: Providers are being registered and verified. Sign up to be notified when one is available near you.

providersList.title: Providers
providersList.subtitle: Browse verified providers by your scope. Rate after each job.
providersList.browsePublicHint: Browsing is open to everyone. You only need to sign in when placing an order.
providersList.emptyBody: Try widening the scope or removing some filters.

overview.title: Admin overview
overview.subtitle: Platform activity at a glance
overview.recentActivityBody: Live event stream will appear here once Supabase is wired.

categories.title: Manage categories
categories.subtitle: Create, edit, enable/disable categories and subcategories

regions.title: Regions & governorates
regions.subtitle: Each region must be activated by an admin to be visible to customers. Activating a region cascades activation to its governorates and cities.
regions.infoBody: Toggling a region cascades the change to all its governorates, and each governorate cascades to its cities. You can later disable a single governorate manually without affecting the others.
regions.noGovernorates: No governorates registered for this region yet.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Search, enable, or disable any user
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email

translations.title: Manage translations
translations.subtitle: Edit any user-facing string without redeploying

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Control languages, themes, windows, and API keys
settings.cancelWindowHint: Requester can cancel free within this window
settings.disputesWindowHint: After this, the dispute right closes
settings.apiKeysIntro: Stored encrypted server-side and never exposed to the browser.

pricing.title: Provider packages
pricing.subtitle: Pick the tier that fits your business. Start free, upgrade when you grow.

ratings.title: Rate your experience
ratings.scorePrompt: How many stars do you give the provider?
ratings.commentPlaceholder: Describe your experience to help others

disputes.title: Open a dispute
disputes.intro: Open a dispute if you faced an issue. Ratings will be frozen and admins will review chat evidence.
disputes.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Provider didn't show up; work incomplete
disputes.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain what happened with details that help the review team
disputes.descriptionHint: Attach photos or audio in the chat before opening, if possible
disputes.opened: Dispute opened. Our team will reach out shortly.

new.title: New service request
new.subtitle: Four quick steps to complete your order
new.notesHint: Optional — anything that helps the provider
new.submittedBody: It will appear in My Orders shortly.

chatDemo.title: Chat preview
chatDemo.subtitle: Visual prototype of an order conversation: text, location, voice, and system messages. Realtime is wired to Supabase in Phase 7.

mapDemo.title: Maps demo
mapDemo.subtitle: Technical preview of the location picker — used later in order creation and provider tracking.
mapDemo.pickerHint: Click on the map to move the pin. If Google Maps key isn't set, a visual placeholder is shown.

requester.title: Welcome
requester.savedEmpty: You haven't saved any service yet.

saved.title: Saved services
saved.subtitle: Save services you use often for quick booking.
saved.empty: You haven't saved any service yet.

customers.title: My customers
customers.subtitle: Everyone you've served before, with your private notes.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Update your details, address and role anytime.
profile.loginCredsIntro: These are the identifiers you can sign in with.
profile.loginCredsHint: Mobile is required. Username and email are optional — add either to make signing in easier.
profile.roleCardIntro: You can be both requester and provider at the same time. Tap an option to enable/disable it. If you keep both, a switch appears to toggle between them.
profile.activeRoleSwitchHint: Decides which dashboard opens by default. You can switch anytime.
profile.addressNote: Your address is used to match you with nearby providers and deliver service. Use the "Detect my location" button to auto-fill the fields.
profile.addressEditNote: Full editing (region → governorate → city → district + map) is wired to live Supabase.

location.mapTitle: Pin your location on the map
location.autoFillBody: Tap to use your current location and we'll auto-fill region, governorate, city and district so you can review before saving.
location.autoFillOk: Detected ✓ — please review the fields below.
location.autoFillPartial: Detected partially. Please complete the missing fields manually.
location.autoFillFail: Couldn't detect your location. Try again or pick on the map manually.
location.autoFillDenied: Location permission denied. Enable it in your browser settings, then retry, or pick manually.
location.autoFillTimeout: Detection took too long. Check your GPS and retry.
location.autoFillNoGeolocation: Your browser doesn't support geolocation. Pick your area manually.
location.noMapsKey: Auto-fill needs the Google Maps API key to be configured.
